Operation 'signoff' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Removes the current user from a given mailing list.
data.description_suggestion: Removes the authenticated user from a specified mailing list. Requires the list name as input. Returns a success confirmation. After execution, the user will no longer receive messages from the list and their membership record will be updated in the system.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required inputs (which list?), what is returned, and side effects of the operation. Added specifics about authentication context, required parameters, return value, and state changes for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'addMember' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is vague about required inputs and outputs. Added clarity on what parameters are needed (user identifier, list name), authentication/authorization requirements, return value, and the side effect of the user receiving list messages.

data.current_summary: Add a user to a list (SOAP)
data.current_description: Used to add a given user to a given list (admin feature).
data.description_suggestion: Adds a specified user to a mailing list (requires admin privileges). Expects the user email/identifier and target list name as inputs. Returns a success confirmation. The user will be added to the list membership and will begin receiving list messages unless subscription is paused.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about required inputs and outputs. Added clarity on what parameters are needed (user identifier, list name), authentication/authorization requirements, return value, and the side effect of the user receiving list messages.

message: Operation 'deleteMember' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks specificity on inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required parameters (user identifier, list name), authorization requirements, return value, and the side effect of membership removal and message cessation.

data.current_summary: Remove a user from a list (SOAP)
data.current_description: Removes a given user from a given list (admin feature).
data.description_suggestion: Removes a specified user from a mailing list (requires admin privileges). Expects the user email/identifier and target list name as inputs. Returns a success confirmation. The user will be removed from the list membership and will no longer receive list messages.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity on inputs and outputs. Added clarity on required parameters (user identifier, list name), authorization requirements, return value, and the side effect of membership removal and message cessation.

message: Operation 'createList' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal. Added clarity on what inputs are expected (list configuration), authorization requirements, return value (list object with identifier), and the resulting state of the newly created list.

data.current_description: Creates a new mailing list (requires appropriate privileges).
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new mailing list in the system (requires appropriate administrative privileges). Expects list configuration parameters such as list name, subject, and description as inputs. Returns the newly created list object with assigned list identifier. The list will be initialized and ready to accept members.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added clarity on what inputs are expected (list configuration), authorization requirements, return value (list object with identifier), and the resulting state of the newly created list.

message: Operation 'closeList' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks input/output specificity and side effect details. Added clarity on required parameters (list name), authorization requirements, return value, and the effects of closing (message posting prevention, membership restrictions, data retention).

data.current_description: Closes a given mailing list (admin feature).
data.description_suggestion: Closes a specified mailing list (requires admin privileges). Expects the list name as input. Returns a success confirmation. The list will be marked as closed, preventing new messages from being posted and new members from joining, though existing member records are retained.
data.reasoning: Description lacks input/output specificity and side effect details. Added clarity on required parameters (list name), authorization requirements, return value, and the effects of closing (message posting prevention, membership restrictions, data retention).

data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding output format. Added clarity on what is returned (array of list objects with specific fields) and the authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding of the response structure.

message: Operation 'soapRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'SOAP endpoint' is too generic and doesn't indicate action. Description lists operations but lacks clarity on input format expectations, authentication requirements, and response format. Enhanced version clarifies SOAP envelope requirement, specifies that responses include fault details, and notes authentication requirements for better AI agent routing.

data.current_description: All Sympa API operations are SOAP-based. Send SOAP XML envelopes to this endpoint. Supported operations include: login, casLogin, authenticateAndRun, authenticateRemoteAppAndRun, lists, complexLists, info, which, complexWhich, amI, review, fullReview, subscribe, signoff, add, del, createList, closeList.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute SOAP operations against Sympa API
data.description_suggestion: Universal SOAP endpoint for executing Sympa mailing list operations. Accepts SOAP XML envelopes containing any supported operation (login, lists, info, review, subscribe, signoff, add, del, createList, closeList, etc.). Returns SOAP XML response containing operation results or fault details. Requires properly formatted SOAP envelope with appropriate authentication credentials for protected operations.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'SOAP endpoint' is too generic and doesn't indicate action. Description lists operations but lacks clarity on input format expectations, authentication requirements, and response format. Enhanced version clarifies SOAP envelope requirement, specifies that responses include fault details, and notes authentication requirements for better AI agent routing.

data.current_description: SOAP login operation. Authenticates user email and password against Sympa user DB.
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a user by validating email and password credentials against the Sympa user database. Requires email and password parameters in SOAP request. On successful authentication, returns a session cookie or authentication token for use in subsequent operations. Failed authentication returns an error response. Establishes an authenticated session for the user.

data.current_description: Returns a list of available mailing lists for the authenticated user. Authorization scenarios are applied.

data.current_description: Subscribes the current user to a given mailing list.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribes the authenticated user to a specified mailing list. Requires list name parameter. Returns subscription confirmation with subscription status and details. May require list owner approval if list has moderated subscriptions.
